case_title: CHRISTOPHER WARD VS. PHILLIP BAXLEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARD, CHRISTOPHER DBA RAGING STALLION STUDIOS, INC.
